creator: dsh@bamus.cz
text:
Created attachment 254026
icingadb.patch

Hi,

Added "-H" daemon(8) flag for interoperability with newsyslog(1) and similar log
rotation / archival mechanisms.

Added "redis" into "REQUIRE:", because icingadb uses "redis".

Fix shellcheck warnings.

While I'm here add example newsyslog.conf and install it into
`etc/newsyslog.conf.d/icingadb.conf`.
